transcript: Speaker A: Meri English thodi weak hai. [My English is a bit weak.] Speaker B: Kya tum apni English improve karna chahte ho? [Do you want to improve your English?] Speaker A: Haan! Haan kaise? [Yes! Yes, how?] Speaker B: English better karne ke liye tumhe ek aise environment mein rehna hoga jahan tum freely practice kar sako. [To make your English better, you need to be in an environment where you can practice freely.] Speaker A: Koi dost nahi hai, paise bhi nahi hai. [I don't have friends, and I don't have money either.] Speaker B: Human teachers ke badle, tum AI English tutor ke sath practice kar sakte ho. [Instead of human teachers, you can practice with an AI English tutor.] Speaker A: Woh kahan? [Where is that?] Speaker B: MySivi pe tum AI teacher Arya ke sath practice kar sakte ho aur apni English improve kar sakte ho. [On MySivi, you can practice with AI teacher Arya and improve your English.] Speaker A: Bohot mehenga hoga na? [It must be very expensive, right?] Speaker B: Hamara AI teacher human teacher se 7 guna sasta hai aur 24/7 available hai. Isliye hamare 1M+ learners hain 150 countries se. [Our AI teacher is 7 times cheaper than a human teacher and is available 24/7. That's why we have 1M+ learners from 150 countries.] Speaker A: Install karo MySivi. [Install MySivi.]
on_screen_text: Meri English Thodi Weak Hai [My English is a bit weak] Kya Tum Apni English Improve Karna Chahte Ho [Do you want to improve your English] Haan! Haan Kaise? [Yes! Yes, how?] English Better Krne Ke Liye [To make English better] Tumhe Ek Aise Environment Me Rahna Hoga Jaha Tum Freely Practice Kr Sako [You need to be in an environment where you can practice freely] Koi Dost Nahi Hai Paise Bhi Nahi Hai [I don't have friends, and I don't have money either] Human Teachers Ke Badle Tum AI English Tutor Ke Sath Practice Kar Sakte Ho [Instead of human teachers, you can practice with an AI English tutor] Wo Kaha? [Where is that?] MySivi Pe Tum AI Teacher Arya Ke Sath Practice Kar Sakte Ho Aur Apni English Improve Kar Sakte Ho [On MySivi, you can practice with AI teacher Arya and improve your English] Bhut Mahenga Hoga Na [It must be very expensive, right] Hamara AI Teacher Human Teacher Se 7 Guna Sasta Hai Aur 24/7 Available Hai [Our AI teacher is 7 times cheaper than a human teacher and is available 24/7] Isliye Hamare 1M + Learner Hai 150 Country Se [That's why we have 1M+ learners from 150 countries] Install Karo MySivi [Install MySivi]
summary: A split-screen ad where a human presenter shares her struggle with English, and an AI avatar recommends the MySivi app. The AI avatar highlights that users can practice 24/7 with an AI tutor named Arya at a fraction of the cost of human teachers. The video ends with a call to action to install the MySivi app.
